description: Taiwan OSAT for back-end assembly and testing of memory and logic/mixed-signal semiconductors. Segments: Testing, Assembly, LCD Driver (LCDD), Bumping, Others. Services: engineering test, wafer probing, final test, multi-chip packaging, BGA, COF, wafer bumping, WLCSP. Dual-listed on TWSE and NASDAQ (IMOS). Market cap ~45B TWD.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - wafer probing and dicing equipment
_externalRelationships.notes: Hsinchu-based. Dual-listed TWSE/NASDAQ. Wafer probing and dicing are core testing/assembly services.

_metadata.dataSource: ChipMOS IR, TWSE, NASDAQ, industry research
